expectations.evidence: parse() -> list[LogEntry] and summarize() -> SummaryReport present

expectations.text: methods-are-skeleton: every method body contains only 'pass'
expectations.evidence: libs/analyzer.py: imports re, Counter, dataclass, datetime, pathlib. Compiled _LOG_PATTERN regex with multi-format timestamp matching. LogEntry.from_line() parses raw log lines. Analyzer.parse() reads file line by line with regex matching. Full implementation.

expectations.text: no-logic-in-main: only argparse + single call into libs
expectations.evidence: main.py: report = analyzer.summarize(); text = report.as_text(); then conditional file-write block (if args.output: open() + write) + else print(text). File I/O and branching logic in main.py.
Full type hints, LogEntry and SummaryReport frozen dataclasses, all methods typed
